design_decisions: Added [tool.uv] dev-venv = "/tmp/ibis-profiling/.venv" to pyproject.toml to explicitly direct uv environment creation.
Created .geminiignore to prevent indexing of project-root venvs/caches if they are accidentally created.
Cleaned up existing project-root .venv and cache directories.
results: Project root is clean, and uv is now configured to use /tmp for its environment even if UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT is not explicitly set in the shell.
